title: Consistent Naming: Skeletal and Zombified Horses
description: A simple pack that renames Skeleton Horses to Skeletal Horses and Zombie Horses to Zombified Horses, matching the naming schemes of the Skeletal Horse skin from Minecraft Legends and the Zombified Piglin!
body: A simple pack that renames Skeleton Horses to Skeletal Horses and Zombie Horses to Zombified Horses, matching the naming schemes of the Skeletal Horse skin from Minecraft Legends and the Zombified Piglin!
